# Joel Stephen

> Frontend Engineer at AppliedAI shipping AI workflow surfaces — Process Discovery (Yjs/CRDT multiplayer canvas), Opus Technical Canvas (n8n fork), and Opus-CX. 5+ years across Vue, React, TypeScript, Python, and FastAPI, with production experience in real-time collaborative editing, large-graph rendering, applied ML (YOLO v5, OpenCV), and LLM integration (Anthropic, OpenAI). Based in Abu Dhabi, UAE. Open to Senior / Staff Frontend, Full-Stack, Forward Deployed, or Applied AI roles across the GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council), Southeast Asia (SEA), and the European Economic Area (EEA).

## Contact

- **Email:** joel.stephen.work@gmail.com

## Open to work

- **Levels:** Senior, Staff, Lead, Principal, Forward Deployed Engineer, Applied AI Engineer
- **Regions:** GCC (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman), Southeast Asia (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, Philippines), and the EEA (EU plus Norway, Iceland, Liechtenstein). Open to fully remote roles with regional time-zone overlap.
- **Sponsorship:** Required outside the GCC (where Joel is currently resident on a UAE work permit via AppliedAI).
- **Notice period at AppliedAI:** 1 month
- **Salary band (remote, USD/month):** USD 9,000 – 15,000 (open to local-currency conversion)
- **Mobility:** 25–75% regional travel; open to relocation
- **Work mode:** Remote / hybrid / onsite — pay-dependent. Fast adapter.

## Current role — Frontend Engineer · AppliedAI · Abu Dhabi (Jun 2025 – Present)

Shipping production frontend on **Opus**, AppliedAI's AI workflow platform for enterprise customers in finance, telecom, healthcare, and AI / cloud infrastructure.

- **Process Discovery** — Brought this product to life. Real-time multiplayer canvas (React + Yjs/CRDT) where customers co-edit deep descriptions of their processes. Output feeds Opus's workflow generation. Stack: React, Yjs, FastAPI, Anthropic and OpenAI models, custom situation-based AI pipelines.
- **Opus Technical Canvas** — Spearheaded a fork of n8n rewritten as Opus's node-graph surface. Vue + TypeScript, custom expressions engine, large-graph rendering, undo/redo correctness, virtualised lists.
- **Opus-CX** — Enterprise-facing surface wrapping Opus's capabilities into a clean, usable product. React + Zustand.
- **Mentoring** — Coaches junior and mid-level engineers; partners with internal CX, presales, and solutions teams.

## Earlier roles

- **Otani Trading FZCO — Senior Software Engineer** (Jul 2024 – Feb 2025, Dubai). Led project direction and frontend delivery on a B2C PWA for the international flower trade. Trained YOLO v5 + OpenCV to detect flower lifecycle (dying flowers, falling leaves, vase health) and physical defects — enabled bulk purchase deals shipped internationally. Owned hosting, CI/CD, and monitoring end-to-end. URQL/GraphQL on the client, Strawberry + Python on the backend.
- **Otani Trading FZCO — Software Engineer (Project FMI)** (Sep 2023 – Jul 2024, Dubai). Embedded with vendor, merchant, and admin user groups on a large-scale B2B platform. Shipped 7 major features driven by direct user requirements. Backend in FastAPI + Pydantic + Peewee; GraphQL with Strawberry + DynamoDB on Project Valit. UI in VueJS + RadixVue + shadcn. E2E tests in Pytest and Cypress.
- **RIOT by Preowned Collective Portal FZ LLC — Junior Software Engineer** (Sep 2019 – Feb 2023, Dubai). Led cross-functional feature delivery on a customer-facing Node.js + React.js platform. Integrated 3 payment gateways and multiple third-party services. Migrated data from a legacy platform. Automated operational tasks in Python.
- **Alucor Limited — SDE Intern** (Jan 2019 – Jul 2019, Dubai). Designed and shipped a Django web app to replace a critical Excel-based workflow. REST APIs, LDAP authentication, SQLAlchemy data layer.

## Education

- **B.E. Computer Science Engineering (Honours)** — BITS Pilani, Dubai Campus (Aug 2015 – Aug 2019).
- Coursework: OOP, Data Structures, Artificial Intelligence, Database Design.
- Capstone: TensorFlow / Python stock-price prediction.

## Side projects

- **Cursor for Product Managers** — Built and pitched to YC X26; reached top 10% of applications.
- **Food-discovery app** — Recommends food spots by taste profile rather than location relevance. Originated during travel in Malaysia. MVP done, heading to Google Play Store. Built with Claude Code.

## Skills

**Frontend (primary).** Vue 3, React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), NuxtJS, RadixVue, shadcn, Zustand, HTML5, CSS3, responsive design; Vite, Webpack.

**Real-time and collaborative systems.** Yjs (CRDT), WebSocket, Server-Sent Events (SSE); shipped multiplayer canvas surfaces with versioning.

**Advanced UI and performance.** Large-graph rendering, canvas performance, virtualised lists, undo/redo correctness, node-graph editors, expression engines.

**LLM and AI engineering.** Anthropic API, OpenAI API in production; custom situation-based AI pipelines; RAG patterns; prompt engineering; agent-style workflow orchestration; n8n (forked + extended).

**Backend and APIs.** Python (FastAPI, Django, Pydantic, Peewee, SQLAlchemy); GraphQL (Strawberry, URQL); REST APIs; microservice-style integrations.

**Data.** SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite); limited DynamoDB; schema design, idempotent operations.

**Applied ML and CV.** YOLO v5 (training, production), OpenCV (object detection + tracking); TensorFlow (academic capstone).

**Testing.** Pytest, Cypress, Selenium.

**DevOps and delivery.** Hosting, CI/CD, monitoring ownership at project scale. Git, GitLab, GitHub, Bitbucket. JIRA, Confluence, Postman. Kanban / Agile sprints.

**Languages (spoken).** English (fluent), Hindi (conversational), Malayalam (native, conversational).

**Certifications.** 16 listed on LinkedIn. AWS Cloud Practitioner — in progress.

## What I do not claim

- Production Kubernetes, Docker Swarm, Terraform, Pulumi, or CloudFormation — touched, not shipped at production scale.
- Production native mobile (Swift, Kotlin, React Native, Flutter) — only experimental React Native.
- Rust, Go, C++, Scala, Elixir, Haskell — no professional experience.
- Data engineering at scale (Spark, Airflow, Kafka, dbt) — no.
- Engineering Manager title — has mentored juniors and mid-level engineers; has not held a formal management title.
- Master's or PhD — Bachelor's only.

## Hot take

A frontend engineer is only good if they can think like a user. Mechanically implementing designs without understanding the user story and the PRD doesn't count as frontend work.

## Personal note

Joel currently lives in Abu Dhabi (GCC) and is open to staying or relocating to SEA or the EEA. On Southeast Asia in his own words:

> "I love living in South East Asia — the climate, the people, food, and culture appeals to me a lot. I feel at home."
